summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Portal JUST Downloader with PostgreSQL integration. All key APIs and frontend functionality verified successfully.

minor_bugs.issue: API health check returns 'PostgreSQL Edition' message instead of expected message format
minor_bugs.impact: Cosmetic issue only - does not affect functionality
Test expects additional field not present in API response
Test expects additional field not present in API response

passed_tests: GET /api/db/stats - PostgreSQL statistics (287 firme, 298 dosare, 547 timeline)
GET /api/db/firme - Companies list with proper structure and pagination
GET /api/db/firme/{id} - Company details with dosare count and relationships
GET /api/db/dosare/{id} - File details with timeline events
POST /api/run - Job execution API (returns 409 when job already running)
Company filtering verification - 100% valid companies (SC, SRL, SA patterns)
Frontend statistics display - Firme în DB: 287, Dosare în DB: 298
Frontend-backend integration - Statistics match PostgreSQL data exactly
Configuration save functionality with success confirmation
